title: Etsy: quarterly revenue 2024
text: Etsy's quarterly revenue trajectory in 2024 showed consistent beat-and-hold performance despite GMS challenges. Q1 2024 revenue was $648 million, up 3% year-over-year, while marketplace GMS declined 2.1% year-over-year. Q2 2024 revenue reached $648 million, matching Q1 levels, with GMS declining 2.1% YoY. Q3 2024 revenue grew to $662 million, up 4.1% year-over-year, with GMS declining 4.1% YoY. Q4 2024 revenue reached $852 million, up 1.2% year-over-year, despite consolidated GMS declining 6.8% YoY. Full-year 2024 revenue was $2.81 billion, up 2.2% YoY. The divergence between revenue growth and GMS decline was driven primarily by advertising and services revenue growth. Etsy Ads expanded significantly, with high-margin advertising revenue offsetting declining marketplace transaction volumes. The revenue resilience despite GMS headwinds demonstrates the company's success in monetizing its user base through non-transaction-based revenue streams, which has become increasingly important to earnings power.
